sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Platform Classification & Attention Economics
required_elements: Platform model classification (social graph, interest graph, messaging, visual/ephemeral, creator economy)
Business model positioning and platform transition dynamics
Leadership credibility assessment (founder product vision, platform pivot track record)
Insider alignment analysis (share ownership %, dual-class voting, insider transactions)
Governance risk assessment (dual-class share structure, voting power concentration)

sections.title: Engagement Economics — The Attention-to-Revenue Bridge
required_elements: DAU/MAU ratio with stickiness assessment (>60% = habitual, <50% = casual)
Time spent per user per day tracking and peer comparison
Sessions per day frequency analysis
Content production vs. consumption ratio (creator ratio trend)
Geographic user mix decomposition (North America, Europe, ROW ARPU variations)
ARPU decomposition by geography and product surface (feed, stories, messaging, video)
Ad load assessment and remaining capacity for incremental density
Ad pricing (CPM/CPE) trends and comparison to peers (demand vs. supply)
Click-through rate, conversion rate, and ROAS benchmarking
Revenue bridge model (impression volume × CPM × fill rate = revenue)

sections.title: Competitive & Ecosystem Mapping
required_elements: Attention competition mapping (all screen-based attention competitors, not just social)
Share of total mobile screen time vs. 2 years ago (gaining or losing?)
App store dependency (iOS/Android distribution, ATT impact quantification)
Regulatory risk exposure (Section 230, DSA/DMA, age verification, data privacy)
Youth safety and reputation risk quantification (litigation reserves, settlement exposure)
AI deployment assessment (content recommendation, ad targeting, content moderation, generative features)
AI as revenue driver vs. cost optimizer distinction

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: Valuation framework by growth stage (high-growth: EV/Revenue, EV/DAU; mature: EV/EBITDA, P/E, FCF yield)
Margin expansion path modeling (theoretical steady-state margins vs. peers)
Price-per-DAU calculation and comparison (Meta $250+, Pinterest ~$50, Snap $30-50)
Growth-adjusted metrics (PEG, EV/Revenue/Growth)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: DAU growth vs. time spent divergence (hollow growth indicator)
Revenue growth vs. DAU growth divergence (monetization improvement or compression)
Ad load increasing while CPM flat/declining (demand not keeping pace)
North America ARPU vs. global ARPU trend divergence (geographic mix shift masking core saturation)
SBC as % of revenue trending (dilution assessment)
Capex intensity increasing (AI infrastructure spend without engagement/revenue improvement)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Advertiser surveys and channel checks (Cowen, Piper Sandler, IAB spend reports) for budget allocation trends
Engagement data validation (Sensor Tower, Data.ai, SimilarWeb for user metrics verification)
Regulatory tracking (Congressional hearings, EU enforcement actions, state AG investigations)

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Platform model clearly identified (social graph, interest graph, messaging, visual, creator economy)
Platform transition dynamics documented (e.g., feed → stories → reels migration)
Founder credibility and platform pivot track record assessed
Insider ownership % documented with dual-class voting structure explained
DAU/MAU ratio calculated and stickiness trend tracked
Time spent per user per day documented with 8-quarter trend
Sessions per day frequency analyzed
Content creator ratio tracked with decline signal monitoring
Geographic user mix decomposed with North America and international ARPU calculated
ARPU decomposed by surface (feed, stories, messaging, video) with growth rates
Ad load current level documented with remaining capacity estimation
CPM/CPE trending documented (rising = demand, falling = oversupply/quality issues)
Click-through rate and conversion rate documented vs. Meta/Google/TikTok benchmarks
Revenue bridge explicit (impression volume × CPM × fill rate calculation)
Attention competition mapped (YouTube, TikTok, gaming, streaming, other screens)
Mobile screen time share calculated vs. 2 years prior (gaining or losing trend)
App store dependency assessed with ATT impact on targeting and measurement quantified
Regulatory risk mapped (Section 230, DSA, DMA, age verification, GDPR state laws)
Youth mental health litigation risk and settlement exposure estimated
AI deployment assessed by use case (recommendation, targeting, moderation, generation)
Valuation framework applied appropriate to growth stage
Price-per-DAU calculated and compared to peers
Margin expansion path modeled to steady-state (target % range for business model)
Investigation tracks include specific advertiser survey sources, engagement data platform references, and regulatory timeline sources
